hero.title: Unlock Your PC's True Performance
hero.subtitle: OneScript optimizes your PC for gaming. Jitter Script for Apex Legends, AI Aimbot, Windows Optimization. More FPS, less latency, maximum stability. Compatible with Windows 10 & 11.

fusionai.title: FUSION AI
fusionai.subtitle: AI Visual Processing
fusionai.description: FUSION AI is a 100% software solution based on computer vision and real-time AI processing. Performance is not capped — it evolves directly with your hardware. The more powerful your PC, the faster, smoother, and more precise the AI engine becomes. No external hardware required (NO ZEN, NO XIM, NO TITAN, NO DMA).

windowsopt.title: Windows Optimization
windowsopt.subtitle: System Optimization
windowsopt.description: Advanced Windows optimization to improve gaming performance. Our tool cleans your system, removes unnecessary services, and optimizes RAM and CPU management for a minimum gain of 40-60 FPS.

jitterscript.title: Jitter Script
jitterscript.subtitle: Anti-Recoil for Apex Legends & Warzone
jitterscript.description: The best Jitter Script for Apex Legends and Warzone on the market. Designed to be undetectable by anti-cheat, it simulates a jitter aim movement to counter weapon recoil. Little to no trembling depending on the scope to appear legitimate, yet powerful enough to destroy your opponents at 150+ meters. Accurate shots at 600 meters depending on settings (strongly discouraged). Unlike other jitter aim scripts on the market, it doesn't cut aim assist. Perfect for all FPS games.
